title: LA Rei
wikitext:
[]: LA Rei?             Quote Post by toe mash » Mon Mar 08, 2010 8:44 am (Taken from live action sequence of EoE) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ LA as in live action. Uhhh, unless I'm mistaken, is that a Rei cosplayer near middle of screen? She has the nerve connector head things, looks like some home made plug suit, and of course the short blue hair. I'm sure a lot of people have noticed this but if you haven't it's pretty intriguing imo. Haven't seen this mentioned before anyway. I wonder why she was included there :S The better to troll you with! , I guess.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Mar 08, 2010 8:55 am ...you missed Asuka and Misato next to her? It's Megumi Hayashibara btw, dressed up as her character rest of my post: "bla bla bla imposing fantasy on reality bla bla deep bla philobabble bla bla otaku criticism bla Anno is genius bla bla drained colours bla bla bla" fill in the details

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Mar 08, 2010 9:39 am Yes, it is the voice actresses dressed as their parts. You should also probably look into watching this: http://www.evamonkey.com/alternate_live_action.php

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Tue Mar 09, 2010 4:48 am Sorry for not noticing them, my screen is a little dark... Megumi is just much more noticeable. I've seen the full LA sequence actually, I know they appear there and in the movie version but wasn't aware they are actually dressed up as them to :X

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Mar 09, 2010 11:33 am just remeber Misato fetishists, some where in a warehouse in Japan lies a Misato jacket. thats your holy grail. (now Misato lovers will be buying tickests to Japan, ii loves to start a little trouble.)

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Wed Mar 10, 2010 6:21 pm I thought this was a sneaky thing to put in, I really liked it when I noticed this on my second viewing [I didn't notice Asuka though D:] that and the dude in the cinema with the Rei plush.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Mar 10, 2010 6:52 pm we need to find a Shinji plush and an Asuka plush, then introduce them.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Mar 11, 2010 1:52 am TOPIC or lock

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Thu Mar 11, 2010 3:27 am the topic title always makes me thinks that there's a spin off series in which Rei goes to Los Angeles but anyways, I did not catch the actors in the character costumes at all when I last watch EoE, so its cool that you pointed that out

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Thu Mar 11, 2010 5:34 am Most likely another example of Anno trolling. But this time in RL.

[]: Re: LA Rei?             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Thu Mar 11, 2010 5:38 am toe mash wrote: I wonder why she was included there :S

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Thu Mar 11, 2010 7:36 am Anyone have any theories as to what Anno was originally intending with these live action scenes? Was he perhaps making a paralle between life and Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Mar 11, 2010 7:51 am Halicat wrote: Anyone have any theories as to what Anno was originally intending with these live action scenes? Was he perhaps making a paralle between life and Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Mar 11, 2010 3:42 pm Halicat wrote: Anyone have any theories as to what Anno was originally intending with these live action scenes? Was he perhaps making a paralle between life and Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Mar 11, 2010 5:04 pm honestly, the live action montage was a work of art. it broke a conception of what anime was allowed to have. hell, lets face it, eva broke a lot of conceptions about the norm for a shonen.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Mar 11, 2010 5:57 pm Anime used plenty of Live Action pre-Eva. For example, like Dr. Nick mention, the Ideon movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Mar 11, 2010 6:08 pm I think as it currently stands Ideon movie is earliest example. Macross Flashback 2012 has live action material abound too

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Fri Mar 12, 2010 7:24 am You know, I really loved that one of the EoE trailers was just the LA content they scrapped. I was like, "WTF" but I thought it was pretty clever to do that. And thank you for the links Ornette!

[]: Re: LA Rei?             Quote Post by toe mash » Fri Mar 12, 2010 1:18 pm Ironfoot wrote: toe mash wrote: I wonder why she was included there :S

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Fri Mar 12, 2010 5:03 pm yes she was can't deny that despite your preferences and such

[]: LA Rei?             Quote Post by toe mash » Mon Mar 08, 2010 8:44 am (Taken from live action sequence of EoE) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ LA as in live action. Uhhh, unless I'm mistaken, is that a Rei cosplayer near middle of screen? She has the nerve connector head things, looks like some home made plug suit, and of course the short blue hair. I'm sure a lot of people have noticed this but if you haven't it's pretty intriguing imo. Haven't seen this mentioned before anyway. I wonder why she was included there :S The better to troll you with! , I guess.
